channel.title: Nature Communications
channel.description:
Nature Communications is an open access, multidisciplinary journal dedicated to publishing high-quality research in all areas of the biological, health, physical, chemical and Earth sciences. Papers published by the journal aim to represent important advances of significance to specialists within each field.

We are committed to providing an efficient service for both authors and readers. Our team of independent editors make rapid and fair publication decisions. Prompt dissemination of accepted papers to a wide readership and beyond is achieved through a programme of continuous online publication.
channel.dc:rights: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.
channel.prism:copyright: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.

item.title: Author Correction: Ultra-coherent meta-emitter tailors arbitrary thermal wavefront
item.content:encoded:
Nature Communications, Published online: 27 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-72460-2

Author Correction: Ultra-coherent meta-emitter tailors arbitrary thermal wavefront
item.dc:title: Author Correction: Ultra-coherent meta-emitter tailors arbitrary thermal wavefront
item.dc:creator: Rui Chen
Tianle Chen
Mengqi Liu
Xingsi Liu
Sen Zhang
Faizan Raza
Hongguang Dong
Yongdi Dang
Zejie Yu
Huan Hu
Jianbin Xu
Cheng-Wei Qiu
Yungui Ma

item.title: Coherent control through phonon anharmonicity
item.content:encoded:
Nature Communications, Published online: 27 April 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-71891-1

Double pump-probe tracks the Raman phonon frequency vs time in SnTe/SnSe, separating electronic, heating, and other anharmonic effects and reveals emergent anharmonicity. Mode specific electron phonon couplings are extracted.
item.dc:title: Coherent control through phonon anharmonicity
item.dc:creator: Gili Scharf
Tomer Hasharoni
Lara Donval
Leah Ben Gur
Alon Ron
